summary: SDM Rewards Merchant Debit Account System - ALL TESTS PASS. Backend APIs (debit-overview, debit-settings, unblock-debit) working correctly. Frontend Admin Settings > Merchant Debit tab displays summary cards and merchant table. Configure Debit Limit modal works from both Merchant Debit tab AND Merchant Detail Modal.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about <tr>/<span> hydration errors in AdminOverview component - not critical but indicates React structure issue
seed_data_creation: Debit settings updated for Test Shop (GHS 500 limit)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Merchant Debit Account system fully functional. Access via Admin Dashboard > Settings > Merchant Debit tab (requires PIN 0000). Summary cards show Total Merchants, Total Debt, Total Credit, Blocked/Warning. Merchants table shows balance, limit, usage%, status. Settings gear icon opens Configure modal. Also accessible from Merchants tab > View Merchant > Debit Account section > Configure Debit Limit button.

backend_apis.description: Returns all merchants with debit account info, summary stats (total_merchants, total_debt, total_credit, blocked_count, warning_count)
Updates debit_limit and settlement_days, validates negative limits return 400, invalid merchant returns 404
Unblocks blocked merchants, returns 400 if not blocked, 404 for invalid merchant

frontend_ui.description: Fetches latest data from debit-overview endpoint

frontend_ui.component: Debit Account Settings Modal (from Settings tab)
Merchant Detail Modal - Debit Account Section
Debit Account Settings Modal (from Merchant Modal)
frontend_ui.description: Opens with current merchant's debit settings pre-filled

data_persistence.verification: Changed Test Shop limit to GHS 500, reflected immediately in table
